# Contro
> A local-first, offline-capable Content Operating System.

## Core Architecture
- **Local-First**: Dexie.js (IndexedDB) is the primary source of truth.
- **State**: Zustand is hydrated from Dexie and acts as the reactive data source for components.
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS v4, utilizing CSS variables (`--background`, `--surface`, etc.) in `globals.css` for light/dark theming.
- **Typography**: Geist (headings), Source Sans 3 (body).

## Key Concepts

### Universal Content Model
All written work (drafts, scheduled posts, calendar entries) shares a single `UniversalContent` model.
- A draft becomes a scheduled post merely by setting a `scheduledFor` timestamp.
- No `tags` or timestamps (`createdAt`, `updatedAt`) are used to maintain ultra-low friction.

### Inventory System
A permanent, reusable library separate from Universal Content. Used for saving templates, hooks, and scripts.

### Auth & Navigation
- `AuthCheck.tsx` guards routes and handles client-side redirects between `/splash`, `/login`, and `/`.
- Uses `loadInitialData()` from the Zustand store to fetch data into memory on load.

## Core Directories
- `src/app/`: Next.js App Router pages and layouts.
- `src/components/`: Reusable UI components (Sidebar, LoadingSkeleton, Modals).
- `src/store/`: Zustand global state.
- `src/services/`: Abstraction layer between UI and Dexie.js database.
- `src/lib/`: Database definitions (`db.ts`) and Supabase clients.
- `docs/`: System documentation (Changelog, Architecture).
